data.title: Massive Bitcoin Bull Run Ahead? Two Chart Patterns Mirror BTC's Rally to $109K
data.description:
• Both the MACD and the death cross recently trapped the bears in a pattern observed before the breakout above $70K.
  • A potential golden cross in the coming weeks could signal a bullish trend, similar to the pattern observed last year.

data.title: MOG Coin Rallies as Elon Musk, Garry Tan Embrace ‘Mog/Acc’ Identity
data.description:
• MOG Coin, a popular memecoin on Ethereum and Base, is gaining popularity by promoting a cultural shift called mog/acc, combining mogging and accelerationism.
  • Influential figures like Elon Musk and Garry Tan have embraced the mog/acc trend, boosting MOG Coin's value significantly.
  • Mog/acc is evolving into an internet-native philosophy, focusing on technological progress and a shared language of winning.

data.title: BlackRock’s Spot Bitcoin ETF Tops World’s Largest Gold Fund in Inflows This Year
data.description:
• IBIT has surpassed the SPDR Gold Trust in year-to-date inflows despite BTC's dour price performance.
  • Resilient inflows represents institutional investors' confidence in bitcoin's long-term prospects.

data.title: Metaplanet Lifts Bitcoin Stash by 555 BTC, Plans to Sell Debt to Buy More
data.description:
• Metaplanet will issue $25 million in bonds to fund further purchases of bitcoin.
  • The Tokyo-based company earmarked the entire offering for EVO FUND only days after selling an earlier tranche of $25 million to the same buyer.
  • The company also said it bought 555 BTC, taking its total stash to 5,555.

data.title: Bitcoin Sees Selling at $97K, Cardano’s ADA Leads Majors Gains Ahead of FOMC Meeting
data.description:
• Bitcoin surged past $97,000 before sliding to $96,500 amid escalating tensions between India and Pakistan.
  • A planned U.S.-China trade meeting initially boosted risk assets, but gains reversed with India's 'Operation Sindoor.'
  • Traders anticipate continued volatility, viewing Bitcoin as a hedge against geopolitical and macroeconomic risks.

data.title: Movement Labs Terminates Rushi Manche After MOVE Token Deals
data.description:
• Movement Labs has severed ties with co-founder Rushi Manche following undisclosed MOVE token deals.
  • The decision was made public after a CoinDesk report exposed secret agreements and hidden advisors linked to the project.
  • MOVE token prices have dropped significantly, with an 8.5% decline in the past 24 hours following Manche's termination.

data.title: Forecasting Fed-Induced Price Swings in Bitcoin, Ether, Solana and XRP
data.description:
• Bitcoin's implied volatility suggests a 24-hour price swing of 2.56%, while Ethereum's is 3.45%.
  • SOL and XRP are likely to see slightly bigger price swings.
  • The Federal Reserve is expected to keep rates unchanged, with potential market reactions to economic outlook commentary.

data.title: IntoTheBlock and Trident Merge With $25M Backing to Build Institutional DeFi Gateway
data.description:
• Decentralized finance specialists IntoTheBlock and Trident Digital have merged into a new company called Sentora.
  • The new venture is also on track to raise $25 million from investors including New Form Capital, Ripple and Tribe Capital, to provide tools helping to bring institutional investors to DeFi.
  • Sentora's platform aims to provide a one-stop shop for asset managers to manage capital, abstracting away the increasing complexities of DeFi markets.

data.title: Citi, Switzerland’s SDX Join Forces to Tokenize $75B Pre-IPO Shares Market
data.description:
• The collaboration will bring late stage, pre-IPO equities to institutional and eligible investors on the SDX platform.
  • The project, which is expected to be live by the third quarter, marks the first step for Citi as a custodian on SDX.

data.title: Bitcoin Races Above $97K on U.S./China Trade Deal Progress
data.description:
• Risk assets — crypto among them — are moving higher Wednesday evening on hopes for a U.S./China trade deal.
  • Bitcoin has jumped about 3% in the last two hours, rising above $97,000.
  • "The current tariffs and trade barriers are unsustainable, but we don’t want to decouple," said U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent.
